name: shadcn
description: shadcn/ui component library CLI and related tooling commands

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest init
commands.description: Initialize shadcn/ui in your project. Sets up tailwind.config, globals.css, cn() utility, and components.json configuration

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add
commands.description: Add a shadcn/ui component to your project. Downloads the component source into your components directory

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest diff
commands.description: Check for differences between local component files and the shadcn/ui registry

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add accordion
commands.description: Add the Accordion component (Radix UI Accordion primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add alert
commands.description: Add the Alert component

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add alert-dialog
commands.description: Add the AlertDialog component (Radix UI AlertDialog primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add aspect-ratio
commands.description: Add the AspectRatio component (Radix UI AspectRatio primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add avatar
commands.description: Add the Avatar component (Radix UI Avatar primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add badge
commands.description: Add the Badge component with badgeVariants

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add button
commands.description: Add the Button component with buttonVariants

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add calendar
commands.description: Add the Calendar component (react-day-picker)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add card
commands.description: Add the Card component with Header, Title, Description, Content, Footer

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add carousel
commands.description: Add the Carousel component (Embla Carousel)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add checkbox
commands.description: Add the Checkbox component (Radix UI Checkbox primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add collapsible
commands.description: Add the Collapsible component (Radix UI Collapsible primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add command
commands.description: Add the Command component (cmdk)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add context-menu
commands.description: Add the ContextMenu component (Radix UI ContextMenu primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add dialog
commands.description: Add the Dialog component (Radix UI Dialog primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add drawer
commands.description: Add the Drawer component (vaul)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add dropdown-menu
commands.description: Add the DropdownMenu component (Radix UI DropdownMenu primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add form
commands.description: Add the Form component (react-hook-form + zod integration)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add hover-card
commands.description: Add the HoverCard component (Radix UI HoverCard primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add input
commands.description: Add the Input component

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add label
commands.description: Add the Label component (Radix UI Label primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add menubar
commands.description: Add the Menubar component (Radix UI Menubar primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add navigation-menu
commands.description: Add the NavigationMenu component (Radix UI NavigationMenu primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add pagination
commands.description: Add the Pagination component

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add popover
commands.description: Add the Popover component (Radix UI Popover primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add progress
commands.description: Add the Progress component (Radix UI Progress primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add radio-group
commands.description: Add the RadioGroup component (Radix UI RadioGroup primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add scroll-area
commands.description: Add the ScrollArea component (Radix UI ScrollArea primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add select
commands.description: Add the Select component (Radix UI Select primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add separator
commands.description: Add the Separator component (Radix UI Separator primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add sheet
commands.description: Add the Sheet component (extends Dialog)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add skeleton
commands.description: Add the Skeleton loading placeholder component

commands.description: Add the Slider component (Radix UI Slider primitive)

commands.description: Add the Switch component (Radix UI Switch primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add table
commands.description: Add the Table component

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add tabs
commands.description: Add the Tabs component (Radix UI Tabs primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add textarea
commands.description: Add the Textarea component

commands.description: Add the Toast and Toaster components (Radix UI Toast primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add toggle
commands.description: Add the Toggle component (Radix UI Toggle primitive)

commands.name: npx shadcn@latest add toggle-group
commands.description: Add the ToggleGroup component (Radix UI ToggleGroup primitive)

commands.description: Add the Tooltip component (Radix UI Tooltip primitive)

commands.name: npm install class-variance-authority
commands.description: Install class-variance-authority (CVA) for creating variant-based className utilities

commands.name: npm install clsx tailwind-merge
commands.description: Install clsx and tailwind-merge, the dependencies for the cn() utility function

commands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-dialog
commands.description: Install Radix UI Dialog primitive directly

commands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu
commands.description: Install Radix UI DropdownMenu primitive directly

commands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-tooltip
commands.description: Install Radix UI Tooltip primitive directly

commands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-accordion
commands.description: Install Radix UI Accordion primitive directly

commands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-select
commands.description: Install Radix UI Select primitive directly

commands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-popover
commands.description: Install Radix UI Popover primitive directly

commands.name: npm install react-hook-form @hookform/resolvers zod
commands.description: Install react-hook-form with zod resolver for form validation (used by shadcn/ui Form component)

commands.name: npm install @tanstack/react-table
commands.description: Install TanStack Table for the DataTable component pattern

commands.name: npm install tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer
commands.description: Install Tailwind CSS and its peer dependencies

commands.name: npm install tailwindcss-animate
commands.description: Install Tailwind CSS Animate plugin used by shadcn/ui for component animations

commands.name: npm install vaul
commands.description: Install vaul drawer library used by the Drawer component

commands.name: npm install cmdk
commands.description: Install cmdk command menu library used by the Command component
